texto: Was there ever such stuff as great as part of Shakespeare? Only one must not say so! But what think you? - What? - Is there not sad stuff? What? - What?
autor: George III of the United Kingdom
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de George III of the United Kingdom que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Was there ever such stuff as great as part of Shakespeare? Only one must not say so! But what thi…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, great, think, com foco em think e you.
